reason: Check final layering: nip72 pure parsing, nostr_sdk retrieval ownership, and no drift back into utils for protocol parsing.
Verify the implementation matches current SDK API style and usage conventions, especially event-returning fetch APIs.

Check FetchEventsByFilter behavior against existing query/timeout/relay selection expectations.
Check relay-choice, hint usage, and event-relay tracking behavior in the new generic fetch path.
Verify tests cover behavior, edge cases, and pure parsing rules rather than relying only on compile success.
Ensure new generic fetch path and community parsing reuse existing SDK patterns instead of duplicating ad hoc logic.
